name: Korra: Cycle
description:
While chilling with her friends in Republic City, Korra is accosted by someone who claims she is part of a heroic cycle than just that as the Avatar; a line of heroes who save worlds then perish. And you, that future self, appears to want to have words.

creator: Jack4884
